text:
🔭 Genie by Databricks

Databricks' conversational analytics suite — three products: Genie Agents (NL → SQL over Unity Catalog, GA June 2025), Genie Code (AI coding assistant for data engineers), and Genie One (agentic coworker for multi-step data tasks across structured/unstructured data, launched June 2026). Not just a chatbot — Genie One can reason and take autonomous multi-step actions.

Key points:
• Queries ANY dataset column (vs Power BI Copilot which is scoped to visualized data only) [Practitioner consensus]
• Consumption pricing: 150 DBU/month free per user; no seat fee — advantage over Power BI F64 capacity (~$5k/mo) [Fact]
• Genie One (June 2026) is the agentic differentiator — orchestrates tasks across Databricks + external data; 3 weeks old, no independent case studies yet [Fact / ⚠ pre-production maturity]
• Requires Databricks Unity Catalog (Pro tier+); AWS + Azure; pricing changes effective July 6, 2026 [Fact]
